lenses.label: Same lens
lenses.instruction: Re-run the existing review intent against the latest exact evidence and explain only material differences.

lenses.label: Architecture
lenses.instruction: Prioritize boundaries, data flow, invariants, coupling, and the execution path worth understanding.

lenses.label: Skeptical review
lenses.instruction: Look actively for accidental complexity, fragile assumptions, missing verification, and reasons the change may not be worth studying.

lenses.label: Teach me
lenses.instruction: Explain the smallest coherent mental model, then walk through one concrete path with explicit invariants.

lenses.label: Less detail
lenses.instruction: Compress the result to the one decision, one tradeoff, and one verification step that deserve attention.

lenses.label: Custom guidance
lenses.instruction: Follow the reader's custom guidance while retaining evidence and uncertainty requirements.

preservedRules: Every claim cites exact commits and files.
Routine work stays quiet unless it changes behavior or exposes a meaningful tradeoff.
Uncertainty remains explicit instead of being silently resolved.
Locked items remain visible until the reader unlocks them.
